news.t: When Eli Lilly Pivots, TMED's Strategy Wins
Eyeing Healthcare Stocks? TMED Is Smashing Its Benchmark
T. ROWE PRICE ADDS THREE NEW TRANSPARENT SECTOR OFFERINGS TO ITS ACTIVE ETF ROSTER

holdings.infoBox: TMED is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 17.14%, UnitedHealth Group at 7.53%, Gilead Sciences at 4.23%, Thermo Fisher Scientific at 4.17%, and Abbott Laboratories at 3.36%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Health Care ETF (TMED) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 21.41m in AUM and 102 holdings. TMED is an actively managed ETF, aiming to outperform its respective sector index TMED was launched on Jun 11, 2025 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: When Eli Lilly Pivots, TMED's Strategy Wins
data.text: The T. Rowe Price Health Care ETF (TMED) led all T. Rowe Price funds last week, posting a 3.4% return.

data.title: Eyeing Healthcare Stocks? TMED Is Smashing Its Benchmark
data.text: In an uncertain marketplace, where are investors to go? Sector funds could provide one intriguing set of tools to consider.

data.title: T. ROWE PRICE ADDS THREE NEW TRANSPARENT SECTOR OFFERINGS TO ITS ACTIVE ETF ROSTER
data.text: BALTIMORE, June 12, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- T. Rowe Price (NASDAQ-GS: TROW), a global investment management firm, announced today the addition of three new active transparent equity exchange-traded funds...
